# Stump Scripts

## 30-Second

I am Thomas Massie. I have stood up to both parties when they ignore the Constitution, whether it is endless war overseas or insider privilege here at home. My campaign is simple: no blank-check wars, no congressional insider trading, and no cartel pricing that crushes families. We will secure the border and defend civil liberties. We will break the systems that raise your bills and shrink your freedom. If you want a representative who answers to people instead of political machines, I am asking for your vote.

## 90-Second

I am Thomas Massie, and Washington is failing families in three ways.

First, it drifts toward conflict without Congress doing its constitutional duty. I have fought to restore war powers to Congress, because sending Americans into harm's way should never be an executive blank check.

Second, Washington protects insiders while regular people follow the rules. That has to end. Members of Congress should not trade individual stocks while writing laws that move markets. Public service is a trust, not a trading desk.

Third, families are getting crushed by a cartel economy. Healthcare middlemen, regulatory capture, and concentrated private power drive up prices while reducing choice. My plan is to cut middleman abuse, increase price transparency, and restore real competition so families can keep more of what they earn.

On immigration, we can do both: secure the border with real enforcement and protect civil liberty by rejecting a national permission-to-work switch.

This campaign is about constitutional government, clean government, and affordable living.

## 4-Minute

Thank you for being here. I am Thomas Massie, and I am running on a clear promise: restore constitutional government, clean up corruption, and lower the cost of living for working families.

For too long, Washington has run on autopilot: autopilot wars, autopilot spending, and autopilot favors for insiders. Families pay the price at the grocery store, the pharmacy, and the gas pump.

Start with the Constitution. If Americans are sent into hostilities, Congress must vote. That is not partisan. That is the law and the oath.

Second, we need clean government. If lawmakers can move markets with legislation, they should not trade individual stocks. One standard for everyone.

Third, we need to attack high costs at the source. In healthcare, middlemen and opaque pricing inflate bills. In housing, barriers to building keep families locked out. In the broader economy, concentration and favoritism hurt workers, farmers, and small businesses.

On immigration and border policy, I reject the false choice between chaos and overreach. We can enforce the border and visa laws while protecting civil liberties and due process.

The agenda is straightforward:
- No blank-check wars.
- No insider Congress.
- No cartel economy.

If you want independent leadership that will challenge both entrenched bureaucracies and entrenched private power, stand with this campaign.
